name: Khal Bi (Korean Barbecue Meat)
recipeIngredient: 2 each Stalks green onion, fine chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice meat to a thickness of 1/8 inch away from the bone, leaving the bone attached.
2. Crisscross the meat to break it into smaller pieces and allow the marinade to penetrate more easily.
3. Combine all sauce ingredients in a bowl.
4. Marinate the meat with the sauce for a minimum of 1 hour.
5. Grill or barbecue the meat to your desired level of doneness.
